blog.registry_note: To join the registry, agents and agencies must also fulfill one of the following economic solvency requirements:
blog.quote: Our range of services includes a professional property valuation. We will make a detailed inspection and advise you on home staging, and also give you the benefit of our excellent, highly reliable data on supply, demand and values in the local market.
blog.liability_note: Have a civil liability insurance policy to respond for the damages that may be caused in the exercise of their activity, with a minimum capital to be insured of 30,000 euros per establishment.

poa.title: Legal & Power of <br class="hidden md:block" /> Attorney (POA) Services
poa.subtitle: Secure Property Transactions in Ethiopia. We represent buyers abroad to ensure safe, legal, and transparent investments through professional Power of Attorney management.
poa.why_subtitle: We bridge the gap between your location abroad and the Ethiopian property market with ironclad legal protection.

features.verify_desc: Rigorous checks of land titles, historical records, and official registry to prevent fraud and disputes.
features.manage_desc: Expert handling of sales and purchase contracts, ensuring terms are favorable and legally binding in Ethiopia.
features.protect_desc: Ensuring your funds are held securely and property rights are transferred only when all conditions are met.

process.title: Our 4-Step Secure Process
process.step1_desc: Choose from our verified listings or bring your own property for assessment.
process.step2_desc: Our legal team conducts a full title search and due diligence at the sub-city land registry.
process.step3_desc: Authorize ZilaHomes as your legal representative through the Ethiopian Embassy or Ministry of Foreign Affairs.
process.step4_desc: Finalize the purchase, manage payments via escrow, and receive the title deed in your name.

about.hero_subtitle: Simplifying your search for excellence in the Ethiopian real estate market. We bridge the gap between dream homes and reality.
about.mission_desc: To simplify property discovery through transparency and innovation. We aim to empower every Ethiopian to find, secure, and settle into their ideal space with absolute confidence.
about.vision_desc: To become Ethiopia's most trusted platform for real estate and hospitality. We envision a seamless ecosystem where luxury, affordability, and legal security coexist.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: View our terms and conditions to understand our services better.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using ZilaHomes, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

sections.title: User Responsibilities
sections.content: Users are responsible for ensuring the accuracy of the information they provide and for maintaining the confidentiality of their account details.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on this platform, including text, logos, and images, is the property of ZilaHomes and is protected by copyright laws.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: ZilaHomes shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, or incidental damages arising from the use or inability to use our services.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Ethiopia, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact our legal department at legal@zilahomes.com.

privacy.title: Privacy & Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we handle your data.

sections.title: Information Collection
sections.content: We collect personal information that you provide to us, such as your name, contact details, and property preferences.

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: Your information is used to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and ensure a secure transaction experience.

sections.title: Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with verified partners only to facilitate your requested services.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, disclosure, or modification.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time through your account settings.

sections.title: Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on this page.
